mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM VIDEOS WHERE IS_DELETED = 0
AND TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
SELECT VIDEO_ID AS videoId, TITLE, DURATION, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt FROM VIDEOS WHERE VIDEO_ID = #{videoId} AND IS_DELETED = 0
SELECT VIDEO_ID FROM VIDEOS ORDER BY VIDEO_ID DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO VIDEOS (VIDEO_ID, TITLE, DURATION) VALUES (#{videoId}, #{title}, #{duration})
mapper.update: UPDATE VIDEOS SET TITLE = #{title} WHERE VIDEO_ID = #{videoId} AND IS_DELETED = 0
UPDATE VIDEOS SET DURATION = #{duration} WHERE VIDEO_ID = #{videoId} AND IS_DELETED = 0
UPDATE VIDEOS SET IS_DELETED = 1, DELETED_AT = NOW() WHERE VIDEO_ID = #{videoId} AND IS_DELETED = 0
